title: WolfTpmDev wrapper adds no value beyond centralizing Drop — net-negative abstraction
description: connection.rs WolfTpmDev wraps a Box<WOLFTPM2_DEV> purely to put Drop in one place. WolfTpmLinuxDev and WolfTpmSwtpm both hold WolfTpmDev as inner. But both types are leaf types with no other shared behavior — there is no polymorphism over them, no trait object usage, no shared method forwarding. The abstraction saves approximately 8 lines of identical Drop code but adds an extra type name, a new() constructor, and a level of indirection in do_transact (self.inner.dev.as_mut()). Suggested rewrite: give each struct a Box<WOLFTPM2_DEV> directly and implement Drop on each. Total code delta is near zero and the type hierarchy becomes flat.
